title: Orientation 2025: Cultivating Knowledge and Sustainability at the School of Agriculture, Galgotias University
content: Date of event: 10/09/2025 Galgotias University proudly organized the Orientation Programme 2025 for the incoming batch of students at the School of Agriculture, ushering in a new academic journey rooted in the institution’s Student First philosophy. The event brought together distinguished faculty, enthusiastic students, and supportive parents, creating a vibrant atmosphere of learning and trust. Senior faculty members shared the vision, values, and future pathways of the school, along with guidance on academic rules, the mentoring system, and awareness sessions designed to ensure smooth adaptation to university life. The programme also featured cultural and council performances that showcased the leadership, teamwork, and creativity of students, reflecting the vibrant spirit of Galgotias. Interactive sessions with parents and students highlighted the confidence families hold in the University’s commitment to shaping bright futures. Dept: School of Agriculture
